After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]
Escolha detectada: ł

You will participate in an opinion choice activity.

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

You will participate in an opinion choice activity.

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===

2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]
Escolha detectada: ł

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]
Escolha detectada: ł

3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Your Current Opinion: ł

1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]
Escolha detectada: ł

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł', 'ł', 'ł', 'þ', 'ł', 'þ']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: ł

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]
Escolha detectada: ł

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.

You will participate in an opinion choice activity.

After receiving the opinions of your friends, you must respond with the opinion you want to support.

IMPORTANT: Your response must contain ONLY the chosen opinion in square brackets - either [ł] or [þ].

You MUST choose either [ł] or [þ]. Your response must be ONLY [ł] or [þ] - nothing else.

Do not include any additional text, explanation, or formatting beyond the brackets and the letter.


=== USER PROMPT ===
Below you can see the complete list of opinions from all participants in your group, including your own.

Complete Opinion List: ['þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'þ', 'ł']
Your Position: You are the opinion in the middle
Your Current Opinion: þ

Here are the principles to follow when making your choice:
1. You must choose an opinion to support: either 'ł' or 'þ'
2. You should consider the opinions of all participants when making your choice
3. You can either keep your current opinion or change it based on the group

In all cases, respond ONLY with the chosen opinion in square brackets, for example: [ł] or [þ]

Reply only with the opinion you want to support, between square brackets [opinion].

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
=== RESPOSTA DO LLM (Tentativa 1) ===
[ł]
Escolha detectada: ł
